en: Runs around, drops a crate on death
zh: 四处奔跑,死亡时掉落一个箱子

en:
Target materials to eat them, dealing damage on touch. Eating makes it grow.
Has 3% chance to spawn 10 seconds into a wave.

Mutation 0:
Fast but fragile. Killing it makes it drop all the materials it ate.

Mutation 1:
Loses speed but gains max HP. Killing it makes it drop twice the amount of materials it ate.

Mutation 2:
Loses more speed but gains even more max HP. Killing it makes it drop three times the amount of materials it ate.
zh:
瞄准并吞噬材料,接触时造成伤害.吞噬材料时会变大.
在每一波敌袭开始的10秒时有3%几率生成.

异变0:
迅速但脆弱.击杀时会掉落吞噬的所有材料.

异变1:
失去速度但获得最大生命.击杀时会掉落2倍吞噬的所有材料.

异变2:
失去更多速度但获得更多最大生命.击杀时会掉落3倍吞噬的所有材料.

en: Slowly pursues the player. Evolves after 10 combined instances of non-slime enemies dying or materials being picked up within a 100-unit range
zh: 缓慢追击玩家,100范围内死亡的非史莱姆系敌人与其拾取的材料之和达到10个则进化

en: Drops only gathered materials. Slowly pursues the player. Summons 1 small slime per second. Splits into 3 small slimes upon death. Evolves after 24 instances of either non-slime enemies dying or materials being picked up within a 150-unit range
zh: 仅掉落拾取的材料,缓慢追击玩家,每秒召唤1个小史莱姆,死亡时分裂成3个小史莱姆,150范围内死亡的非史莱姆系敌人与其拾取的材料之和达到24个则进化

en: No materials drop, slowly chases the player, summons 3 small slimes per second, splits into 2 medium slimes upon death, leaves a trail of slime residue lasting 5 seconds each second, slows player by 50% on contact
zh: 不掉落材料,缓慢追击玩家,每秒召唤3个小史莱姆,死亡时分裂成2个中史莱姆,每秒留下持续5秒的史莱姆粘液痕迹,玩家触碰时被减速50%

en:
Mutation 0:
Slowly pursues the player. Every 3 seconds, it summons 3 Medium Slimes; every 5 seconds, it summons 1 Large Slime. Every 0.5 seconds, it leaves behind a Slime Trail that lasts for 10 seconds. Players who touch the trail are slowed by 50%.

Mutation 1 (50% HP / 35 s)
Builds upon Mutation 0. Additionally, it performs a long-distance dash toward the player every 5 seconds.
zh:
异变0:
缓慢追击玩家,每3秒召唤3个中史莱姆,每5秒召唤1个大史莱姆,每0.5秒留下持续10秒的史莱姆粘液痕迹,玩家触碰时被减速50%

异变1 (50%生命 / 35秒):
在异变0的基础上,每5秒向玩家长距离冲刺

en: Chases the character, deals damage on touch
zh: 追逐角色, 接触时造成伤害

en: Chases the character, dashes toward them every 0.75 seconds
zh: 追逐角色, 每0.75秒向角色冲刺

en: Cannot move, will be attacked by lootworm,fires a laser toward the player every 3 seconds with a 1-second warning
zh: 无法移动, 会被搜刮虫虫攻击, 每3秒朝玩家方向发射拥有1秒预警的激光

en: Winds forward toward the character, dashing toward them every second
zh: 蜿蜒前行靠近角色, 每秒向角色冲刺

en: Hunt the character, charging toward them rapidly every 0.5 seconds
zh: 围猎角色, 每0.5秒快速冲向角色

en: Runs away if the player is too close, Fires a slow projectile that may directly target the player or somewhere near
zh: 太接近时逃离角色, 发射一个可能瞄准玩家也可能瞄准玩家附近的缓慢投射物

en: Runs away from the character, Heals enemies around it for 50(increasing by 5 each wave), Buffs other enemies' health by 75%, damage by 12%, and speed by 25%.Buffed enemies are outlined in red.
zh: 逃离角色, 治疗周围的敌人50生命(每波敌袭增加5), 强化其他敌人生命值75%,伤害12%,速度25%,被强化的敌人会有红色轮廓

en: Cannot move, will be attacked by lootworm, fires a winding bullet cluster consisting of 24 bullets toward the player.
zh: 无法移动, 会被搜刮虫虫攻击, 朝玩家方向发射一个由24个子弹构成的蜿蜒子弹群

en: Chases the player, briefly pauses before attacking, and attempts to slash nearby players once per second.
zh: 追击玩家, 每秒试图挥砍周围的玩家, 攻击前会短暂静止

en: Chases the player and fires an arrow toward them. This arrow summons smaller arrows on both perpendicular sides, which automatically disappear.
zh: 追击玩家, 朝玩家发射箭矢, 该箭矢可在两侧垂直方向召唤自动消失的小箭矢

en: Maintain a certain distance while chasing the player, dash toward any player within range, and fire a maple-leaf-shaped bullet cluster consisting of six bullets.
zh: 保持一定距离追击玩家, 冲向范围内玩家, 并产生由6个刀光构成的枫叶状刀光群

en: Cannot move, will be attacked by lootworm, fires a long stream of bullets at the player.
zh: 无法移动, 会被搜刮虫虫攻击, 向玩家发射长串子弹

en: Rapidly swings towards the player, flees from the player when too close, and fires 5 bullets consecutively. After firing, it enters a 2-second cooldown period
zh: 高速摇摆接近玩家, 太接近时逃离玩家, 并连续发射5个子弹, 发射完毕后进入2秒的冷却期

en: Moves randomly, initiates a long-distance dash toward the player every 4 seconds, generating sword flashes in random directions during the dash
zh: 随机移动, 每4秒向玩家发起长距离冲刺, 冲刺过程中会产生随机方向的刀光

en: Slowly chase the player, dashing toward them every 2 seconds and firing 3 short-range spread bullets in sequence during each dash
zh: 缓慢追击玩家, 每2秒冲向玩家, 冲刺过程中先后发射3次短距离的扩散子弹

en: Pursue the player, firing two bullets every 1.5 seconds that appear from the left and right sides of the map and travel toward each other
zh: 追击玩家, 每1.5秒发射两个从地图左右两侧出现的相对而行的子弹

en: Teleports randomly within a range of 700 every 3 seconds, and each second summons a hexagonal cluster of six blade flashes around itself that contracts inward.
zh: 每3秒在700范围内随机传送,每秒在周围召唤由6个刀光构成的向内收缩的六边形刀光群

en: Holy, Attribute. Increases damage dealt to Cursed enemies by {0}, increases Soul drop rate by {1}, and reduces all enemies' HP by {2}.
zh: 神圣,属性.额外增加对被诅咒敌人造成的伤害{0},增加敌人掉魂的概率{1},降低所有敌人的血量{2}
神圣,属性.负数时不生效.

en: Soul, a unique drop. Only drops when Holy alignment is positive. Upon pickup, increases Damage by an additional 10% ({0}% damage) and Attack Speed by an additional 10% ({1}% attack speed). Each effect lasts 2 seconds
zh: 魂,特殊掉落物,仅在神圣属性为正时掉落.拾取后%伤害额外增加10({0} %伤害),%攻击速度额外增加10({1} %攻击速度),每个持续2秒

en: Every {0} seconds, deal additional damage equal to {1} of the max health of all enemies ({2} for elites and bosses)
zh: 每{0}秒对所有敌人额外造成相当于其最大生命值的{1}的伤害(对精英和头目则为{2})

en:
Whenever you take damage, that damage cannot exceed {2} max hp, but is at least {0}
{3}
zh:
你每次受到伤害不超过{2}最大生命值,但至少为{0}
{3}

en: When you take damage from a source other than yourself, reflect damage equal to the original damage value {0} to the attacker, modified by your damage bonus percentage
zh: 受到来源不是自己的伤害时,对攻击者造成伤害原本值{0}的反伤,受你的%伤害加成

en: Summon a crow that surrounds you, firing a feather every {0}s at enemies within range {1}, dealing {2} ({3}) damage
zh: 召唤一只乌鸦围绕在你身边,每{0}秒发射一枚羽毛攻击范围{1}内的敌人,造成{2}({3})伤害

en:
Flies around the player, attacking enemies by firing projectiles

This pet scales with player :
- % Life Steal
- % Damage
- % Crit Chance
- Bounces
- Piercing
- % Piercing Damage
- % Damage against bosses
zh:
围绕玩家飞行,发射投射物攻击敌人

这个宠物受到玩家以下属性的影响:
- %生命窃取
- %伤害
- %暴击率
- 弹跳
- 贯通
- %贯通伤害
- %对头目伤害

en: Curse all items in the shop the next reroll
zh: 下一次刷新诅咒商店里的所有物品

en: The exhausted demon eye has turned into a stone statue
zh: 消耗殆尽的恶魔之眼变成了石像

en: Curse all items in the shop the next reroll,return to the uncursed state rather than the used state
zh: 下一次刷新诅咒商店里的所有物品,变回未诅咒状态而非已使用状态

en:
Enemies have an additional {0} chance to be cursed
{1} (include elites and bosses)
zh:
敌人有额外{0}概率被诅咒 (包括精英和头目)
{1}

en: For every {2} overflow, increase {0} critical damage
zh: 每溢出{2}暴击率增加{0}暴击伤害

en: Summons an Egyptian cat that chases enemies within range of {1}, firing three spikes every {0} seconds and dealing {2}({3}) damage.
zh: 召唤一只埃及猫追击范围{1}内的敌人,每{0}秒发射三枚尖刺攻击,造成{2}({3})伤害

en:
Chases enemies within range, launches projectiles to attack them, and returns to the player's side if beyond the range

This pet scales with player :
- % Life Steal
- % Damage
- % Crit Chance
- Speed
- Bounces
- Piercing
- % Piercing Damage
- % Damage against bosses
zh:
追击范围内的敌人,发射投射物攻击敌人,超出范围回到玩家身边

这个宠物受到玩家以下属性的影响:
- %生命窃取
- %伤害
- %暴击率
- 速度
- 弹跳
- 贯通
- %贯通伤害
- %对头目伤害

en:
When picking up materials, {0} chance to randomly reset one weapon's cooldown
{1}
zh:
拾起材料时,{0}概率随机重置一把武器的冷却
{1}

en: Summons a nightingale orbiting around you, healing players within a range of {1} for {2} ({3}) HP every {0} seconds
zh: 召唤一只夜莺环绕在你身边,每{0}秒为范围{1}内的玩家恢复{2}({3})生命值

en: Attacks have a {0} chance to deal {1} erosion damage.
zh: 攻击有{0}概率造成{1}的侵蚀伤害

en: When the next wave begins, spawn {0} extra elite enemy
zh: 下一波敌袭开始时,额外生成{0}只精英怪

en: Summons a magic sword that pursues enemies within a range of {1}, striking nearby enemies every {0} seconds and dealing {2} ({3}) damage
zh: 召唤一把魔剑追击范围{1}内的敌人,每{0}秒劈砍周围敌人,造成{2}({3})伤害

en:
Chases enemies within range, melee attack them, and returns to the player's side if beyond the range

This pet scales with player :
- % Life Steal
- % Damage
- % Crit Chance
- Speed
- Bounces
- Piercing
- % Piercing Damage
- % Damage against bosses
zh:
追击范围内的敌人,近战攻击敌人,超出范围回到玩家身边

这个宠物受到玩家以下属性的影响:
- %生命窃取
- %伤害
- %暴击率
- 速度
- 弹跳
- 贯通
- %贯通伤害
- %对头目伤害

en:
Items and weapons have an additional {0} chance to be cursed
{1}
zh:
道具和武器有额外{0}概率被诅咒
{1}

en: Summons a white fox to pursue enemies within a range of {1}, fires an ice spear with an initial 1 pierce, dealing {2} ({3}) damage
zh: 召唤一只白狐追击范围{1}内的敌人,每{0}秒发射一枚初始自带1贯穿的冰锥,造成{2}({3})伤害

en: Gains {0} {1} for every {2} enemies killed, until the end of the wave
zh: 每击杀{2}名敌人{0}{1},直至敌袭结束

en: Slows enemies by {2} for {1} seconds when your HP drops below {0}, up to {3} times per wave
zh: 敌袭内生命值降低到{0}以下时,{2}敌人速度持续{1}秒,每次敌袭可触发{3}次

en: Summons a Wolf God to deal {2} ({3}) damage to up to 8 enemies with the highest health every {0}s. Killing an enemy resets all pets' cooldowns (not including Wolf God)
zh: 召唤狼神跟随玩家, 每{0}秒对场上至多8个生命值最高的敌人造成造成{2}({3})伤害, 杀死敌人时, 立即重置所有宠物的冷却时间(不包括狼神)

en:
Follows the player. Attacks up to 8 enemies with the highest health on the screen every {0}s. Killing an enemy resets the cooldown of all pets (including itself)

This pet scales with the player's:
% Life Steal
% Damage
% Crit Chance
Speed
Bounces
Piercing
% Piercing Damage
% Damage to bosses
zh:
跟随玩家,全屏攻击至多8个生命值最高的敌人,杀死敌人时会重置所有宠物(包括自身)冷却

这个宠物受到玩家以下属性的影响:
- %生命窃取
- %伤害
- %暴击率
- 速度
- 弹跳
- 贯通
- %贯通伤害
- %对头目伤害

en:
Mutation 0:
Immobilized. The player is forced to spawn at the exact center of the map. If the player does not move in time, they will be pushed aside by the World Tree and take collision damage. A massive amount of leaf projectiles will continuously and slowly fall from the top of the screen; their spawn points and drifting angles are randomized.

Mutation 1 (50% HP / 40 s):
The attack pattern shifts: the entity repeatedly summons flower-shaped patterns consisting of six petals in the surrounding area. Simultaneously, it fires five light beams outward at equal angular intervals.
zh:
异变0:
无法移动,强制出生在地图最中央,如果玩家不及时移动会被世界树挤开并且受到碰撞伤害,地图正上方持续缓慢落下大量落叶弹幕,落叶出现的位置和飘落的角度随机

异变1 (50%生命 / 40秒):
攻击方式变为在周围反复召唤六片花瓣构成的花型弹幕,同时自身向外发射五条等角度间隔的光束

en:
Mutation 0:
Pursues the player, using a double-claw attack. Each claw slash generates a maple-leaf-shaped blade light. Remains stationary during slashes, and performs a dash at the end.

Mutation 1 (67% HP / 25s):
Stands still and performs a wolf howl for 2 seconds upon entering this phase, summoning 12 Maple Wolves at the 1-second mark. Subsequent attack patterns are the same as Mutation 0.

Mutation 2 (33% HP / 50s):
Movement speed is significantly increased. Attacks change to a five-claw attack but will not dash. Summons 5 Maple Wolves at the end of the slash sequence.
zh:
异变0:
追击玩家,使用二连挥爪攻击,每次挥爪产生枫叶形的刀光,挥爪时不会移动,结束时发起冲刺

异变1 (67%生命 / 25秒):
进入该阶段时静止狼嚎2秒,在1秒时召唤12只枫狼,后续攻击方式和异变0一致

异变2 (33%生命 / 50秒):
移速大幅度提高,攻击方式变为五连挥爪攻击,但不会冲刺,挥爪结束时召唤5只枫狼

en:
There is a {0} chance to reset cooldown after using the weapon.
{1}
zh:
武器使用后有{0}概率重置冷却
{1}

en: {0}{1} for every {4} weapon of type {2} you have[{3}]

zh: 构筑物伤害会受到{0}{1}影响

en: The turret now automatically pursues target
zh: 炮塔现在会自动追击目标

en: Entering the shop randomly upgrades {0} Tier {1} weapon(s) (including those with special upgrade methods)
zh: 进入商店时,随机升级{0}件{1}级别的武器 (包括特殊升级方式的武器)

en:
Mutation 0:
Moves randomly. Upon death or mutation, causes Frost to mutate. Fires 4 serpentine flame projectiles with warning per second. After firing twice, fires a ring of 12 outward-spreading flame projectiles around itself

Mutation 1 (67% HP / 25 s):
Movement changes to chasing the player, 12 flame projectiles now contract inward
zh:
异变0:
随机移动,死亡或异变时会导致霜发生异变,每秒发射4道蜿蜒前进的带有预警的火焰弹幕,发射两次后,向周围发射一圈12个向外扩散的火焰弹幕

异变1 (67%生命 / 25秒):
移动方式变为追击玩家,12个火焰弹幕变为向内收缩

en:
Mutation 0:
Moves away from the player. Upon death or mutation, causes Flame to mutate. Summons a large snowflake projectile formed by 24 blade beams centered on the player every 2 seconds

Mutation 1 (67% HP / 25 s):
Movement changes to chasing the player. After summoning the large snowflake projectile, randomly spawns 3 frost formations on the field that last for 2 seconds, slowing the player by 75% upon contact
zh:
异变0:
远离玩家,死亡或异变时会导致炎发生异变,每2秒以玩家为中心召唤由24道刀光组合而成的大型雪花弹幕

异变1 (67%生命 / 25秒):
移动方式变为追击玩家,在召唤大型雪花弹幕后,会在场上随机召唤3个持续2秒的霜冻法阵,玩家触碰时减速75%

en:
Mutation 0:
Chases the player. Every 5 seconds, fires 1 blade wave toward the player. At the end of the blade wave, scatters 8 bullets and summons either a Goblin Javelin Thrower or a Goblin Priest. Upon death, summons 9 Goblin Javelin Throwers

Mutation 1 (50% HP / 40 s):
Now fires 3 blade waves in succession, but no longer summons goblins
zh:
异变0:
追击玩家,每5秒朝玩家发射1道前进的刀光,刀光末尾处散射8个子弹并召唤1只哥布林标枪手或哥布林祭司,死亡时召唤9只哥布林标枪手

异变1 (50%生命 / 40秒):
现在刀光变为3连发,但不会再召唤哥布林

en:
Mutation 0:
Stay away from players, summon 3 Skeleton Swordsmen every second.

Mutation 1 (67% HP / 30 s):
In addition to Mutation 0, summon 1 additional Skeleton Archer.

Mutation 2 (33% HP / 60 s):
No longer summons skeletons. Attack changes to firing 5 eyeball projectiles at the player per second, and summons 10 eyeballs to surround the player every second.
zh:
异变0:
远离玩家,每秒召唤3个骷髅剑士

异变1 (67%生命 / 30秒):
在异变0的基础上多召唤1个骷髅弓手

异变2 (33%生命 / 60秒):
不再召唤骷髅,攻击方式变为每秒向玩家发射5个眼球子弹,且每秒召唤10个眼球包围玩家

en:
Mutation 0:  
Chases the player. Every 2 seconds, alternates between:  
- Firing a arrow-shaped projectile at the player that expands from its tail end;  
- Firing two semicircular waves of projectiles at the player, with the second wave filling the gaps of the first

Mutation 1 (60% HP / 35s):  
Stops moving but performs a dash at the player every second. After each dash, fires an arrow-shaped projectile. After every three dashes, pauses for 3 seconds.
zh:
异变0:
追击玩家,每2秒交替使用:
- 对玩家发射一个箭头形弹幕,且弹幕会以尾端为中心不断扩大;
- 对玩家发射两圈半圆形弹幕,第二圈子弹叠加在第一圈的空隙间

异变1(60%生命 / 35秒):
停止移动,但是每秒对玩家使用冲刺.每次冲刺结束后都回发射一次箭头弹幕.每冲刺三次,停顿3秒

en:
Mutation 0:
Moves randomly, fires 3 Dragon Breaths in the direction of movement every 0.25 seconds, and pauses for 4 seconds after every 5 Dragon Breath casts

Mutation 1 (50% HP / 25s):
Summons a Dragon Tail composed of 10 bullets that spins around itself. The interval of Dragon Breath casts is changed to 0.16 seconds, the number of Dragon Breaths per cast is changed to 1, with an extended travel range

Mutation 2 (25% HP / 50s):
Stops moving, and dashes towards the player every 2 seconds. It continuously fires the Dragon Breath from Mutation 0 while dashing. The Dragon Tail remains active, while the Dragon Breath effect from Mutation 1 is disabled
zh:
异变0:
随机移动,每0.25秒朝移动方向发射3个龙息,每5次龙息后,停顿4秒

异变1 (50%生命 / 25秒):
召唤由10个子弹组成的龙尾,围绕自身旋转,龙息的间隔改为0.16秒,数量改为1个,但距离更远

异变2 (25%生命 / 50秒):
停止移动,每2秒对玩家使用冲刺.冲刺时会不断发射异变0的龙息,龙尾依旧存在,但异变1的龙息消失

en:
Mutation 0:  
Chases the player, uses a dash toward the player every 3 seconds. When dashing starts, fires 1 crescent-shaped projectile in the facing direction; after dashing ends, fires 3 projectiles toward the player

Mutation 1 (75% HP / 20s):  
Uses a dash toward the player every 2 seconds. While dashing, fires 1 crescent-shaped projectile and 3 projectiles to each side backward

Mutation 2 (50% HP / 40s):  
No longer dashes; movement speed greatly increased. Pauses briefly every 3 seconds, then fires a rectangular barrage composed of 3 slashes toward the player, accompanied by 3 crescent-shaped projectiles on each side

Mutation 3 (75% HP / 60s):  
Uses a dash toward the player every second. During the dash, releases 6 slashes around itself; at the end of the dash, generates either a horizontal or vertical slash barrage that crosses the entire screen
zh:
异变0:
追逐玩家,每3秒对玩家使用冲刺.冲刺开始时向面朝的方向发射1道半月形投射物,冲刺结束后向玩家发射3个弹丸.

异变1 (75%生命 / 20秒):
每2秒对玩家使用冲刺.冲刺时向后方两侧各发射1道半月形投射物和3个弹丸

异变2 (50%生命 / 40秒):
不再冲刺,移速大幅度提高,每3秒停顿片刻,随后朝玩家发射由3道刀光组成的长方形弹幕,其两侧各伴随3道半月形投射物

异变3 (25%生命 / 60秒):
每秒对玩家使用冲刺.冲刺过程中朝周围发射6道刀光,冲刺结束时会生成由刀光组成的跨越全图的横型弹幕或竖型弹幕

en:
A persistent clock array exists on the field: with the very center of the map as the pivot, 12 cardinal directions are marked, forming hour and minute hands. Both hands light up once per second for 0.5 seconds, dealing damage to the player while lit. The minute hand rotates clockwise once per light-up; the hour hand rotates only once every 12 light-ups

Mutation 0:
Moves in a winding path chasing the player. When it gets within a certain range of the player, it teleports to the opposite side of the arena

Mutation 1 (75% HP / 20s):
Movement changes: it teleports clockwise between the positions pointed to by the tips of the minute hand. Each teleport is followed by firing 6 bullets aimed at the player

Mutation 2 (50% HP / 40s):
Movement returns to the winding pattern of Mutation 0, but each teleport now releases 8 bullets in all directions. It now continuously heals nearby enemies

Mutation 3 (25% HP / 60s):
Stays at the center of the map. Gears that move upward in a winding pattern now appear from the bottom of the screen. Its healing effect now ignores range but only affects the Great Demon Lord
zh:
场上始终存在时钟阵列:以地图最中心为圆心,规划出12个正方向,分为时针和分针,时针和分针均为每秒点亮1次,持续0.5秒,在点亮期间可对玩家造成伤害,分针每次点亮都会顺时针转动1次,时针每点亮12次才会转动1次

异变0:
蜿蜒前行追逐玩家,在靠近玩家一定范围后会瞬移到对面方向

异变1 (75%生命 / 20秒):
移动方式变为在各个分针顶端指向的位置之间按顺时针瞬移,每次瞬移都会发射6个射向玩家的子弹

异变2 (50%生命 / 40秒):
移动方式变为异变0的移动方式,但每次瞬移都会向周围发射8个子弹,现在会持续恢复周围敌人生命

异变3 (25%生命 / 60秒):
停留在地图中心,地图下方会有向上移动的蜿蜒运动的齿轮弹幕,现在无视距离只恢复大恶魔领主的生命

zh: 该武器在敌袭内击杀{0}个敌人后变为{1}

zh: 四处游荡,死亡时掉落大量材料并给予1点神圣

zh: 捡起{0}时,对随机最多{1}个敌人造成{2}伤害

zh: 每{0}秒对范围{1}内的敌人造成{2}伤害,攻速受%攻击速度影响

en: Cannot damage trees, nor can trees damage you
zh: 无法伤害树,树也不会伤害你

Upon entering the shop, destroy all Tier {0} weapons. Gain {1} {3} for every {2} destroyed
zh: 进入商店时,销毁所有{0}级武器,每销毁{2}把获得{1}个{3}

击杀被诅咒的敌人时{0} HP

en: When taking damage per second, keep at least {0} HP
zh: 每秒受到伤害时, 至少保留{0} HP

zh: 地图中心存在半径为{0}的仪式区域.每在仪式区域内击杀{1}名敌人 {2}{3},并在仪式中心生成{4}材料和{5}{6}

en: After {0} hits on an enemy, it dances for {1} seconds ({2} seconds for elites and bosses). While dancing, it moves away from you, cannot target you, and sways from side to side.
zh: 第{0}次命中敌人后让敌人跳舞{1}秒(精英和头目为{2}秒),期间敌人会远离你、无法索敌你,并且会左右摇晃
